case_title: NAFISA YASINI ET AL VS. TURKISH AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY YASINI, NAFISA AMINIA, ASADULLAH AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
